predictions.description: remove-empty-values drops empty string, whitespace-only, and null — but keeps '0' (emptiness is about absence of text, not JS falsiness) and preserves survivor order.
clear-list leaves an empty array (not null, not a missing parm).
sort-email-list by subject ascending is case-insensitive: 'alpha digest' sorts before 'Middle memo' before 'Zeta report' (a strict ASCII sort would have put the capitalized subjects first).
sort-email-list by dateReceived descending orders third (Feb 28) > second (08:00:01) > first (08:00:00) — a 1-second timestamp difference is enough to decide the order.
